text.title: AuraShip Shopping Assistance
text.subtitle: No credit card to shop online? Use AuraShip's corporate credit card securely to complete your online purchase.
text.description: Our shopping assistance service is designed for customers who want to shop online but don't have a credit card. AuraShip allows you to complete your online purchase using our card securely. Simply pay us back: we charge a 5% fee of the purchase amount if you reimburse us via cash, or a 10% fee if you reimburse us via your debit card.

cash.label: Cash Purchase
cash.description: 5% fee if you pay via cash

debit.label: Debit Card Purchase
debit.description: 10% fee if you pay via debit card
